insight: ChatControl's `Tooltip_Style` format-part option renders hover text inside a `show_item` carrying `minecraft:tooltip_style`, so resource packs like ItemsAdder draw custom tooltip backgrounds; it needs MC 1.21.2+ and only works when a `Hover` is set on the same part (else ignored with a console warning). It styles ONLY hovers ChatControl builds from its own formats/channels/rules and cannot restyle hovers from other plugins.
